name: Golf-A-Round Lawson
about: Golf-A-Round Lawson is an indoor golf and sports center featuring three FullSwing Simulator Bays that provide access to over 60 iconic PGA courses. The facility offers a year-round golf experience with realistic ball tracking and topography, complemented by a variety of indoor sports games like zombie dodgeball, baseball, and basketball. Pricing is straightforward at $40 per hour on weekdays and $50 per hour on weekends, with costs applied per bay rather than per person, accommodating up to 8 golfers per bay. The venue also includes private event rentals, professional golf lessons, and membership options for frequent visitors.
why_golfers_like_it: 60+ iconic PGA courses with realistic ball tracking
Accommodates up to 8 golfers per bay, making it great for groups
Professional instruction from PGA Certified Teaching Professional Tim Underwood

food_and_drink.notes: On-site snack bar offering chicken wings, pizza, pretzels, corn dogs, candy, fries, mozzarella sticks
No alcohol mentioned on the menu

simulator_hardware.notes: 3 FullSwing Simulator Bays with precision ball tracking technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not mention club rentals, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has an on-site snack bar but does not specify if outside food and drinks are allowed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify the duration for 18 holes, but it can accommodate up to 8 golfers per bay.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers activities like zombie dodgeball and can accommodate groups of all sizes, making it suitable for families and kids.
